Created attachment 220703
The error!

Hello,

I installed Firefox version firefox-84.0_2,2 and is experiencing the following problem:

--------------------------------------------------------
jonaslopes@freebsd:~ % firefox

(firefox:16310): GVFS-RemoteVolumeMonitor-WARNING **: 19:32:13.270: remote volume monitor with dbus name org.gtk.vfs.HalVolumeMonitor is not supported
JavaScript error: resource://gre/modules/XULStore.jsm, line 66: Error: Can't find profile directory.
JavaScript error: resource://gre/modules/XULStore.jsm, line 66: Error: Can't find profile directory.
console.error: Region.jsm: "Error fetching region" (new TypeError("NetworkError when attempting to fetch resource.", ""))
console.error: Region.jsm: "Failed to fetch region" (new Error("NO_RESULT", "resource://gre/modules/Region.jsm", 376))

--------------------------------------------------------

Does not enter any website =(
